ideation: This animation sequence aims to visually represent the concept of 'free of charge' or 'no charge' conveyed by the 🈚 emoji.  The animation will use a combination of arm gestures to symbolize the offering of something without cost. I'll start with open hands, then transition to a gesture that suggests something is being given, and finally settle into a relaxed posture that indicates the completion of the transaction. The arms will move in sync, creating a balanced and visually appealing animation.  The use of both arms will emphasize the generosity involved in the free offering.

frames.beat: arms open wide, offering something for free
arms sweep forward, presenting the gift
arms relax, the free offering is complete
